case.title: U.S. v. FIRST NATIONAL CITY BANK.

opinion.h1: U.S. v. FIRST NATIONAL CITY BANK., 377 U.S. 951 (1964)
opinion.h2: UNITED STATES, petitioner, v. FIRST NATIONAL CITY BANK. No. 998.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Oberdorfer and Harold C. Wilkenfeld, for the United States.
Edward J. Ross, for Chase Manhattan Bank and others, as amici curiae.
Facts and opinion, U. S. v. Omar, S.A., D.C., 210 F. Supp. 773; 321 F.2d 14; 325 F.2d 1020.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit granted and case placed on the summary calendar.[ U.S. v. First National City Bank. 377 U.S. 951 (1964) ]
